kiro-update-checker.checkNow.title: Kiro: Check for Updates Now
kiroUpdateChecker.config.title: Kiro Update Checker Configuration
kiroUpdateChecker.checkInterval.descript: Interval in minutes to check for updates. Set to 0 to disable automatic checks.
kiroUpdateChecker.enableOnStartup.descri: Whether to check for updates on startup.
kiroUpdateChecker.autoDownload.descripti: Whether to automatically download and install new versions.
kiroUpdateChecker.downloadFolder.descrip: Custom folder to download updates to. Leave empty to use the default Downloads folder.
